name: Creamy Dill Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1 cup Milk
2 tbsp Butter
2 tbsp Flour
1/2 tsp Dill; dried
1/2 tsp Paprika
1/4 tsp Salt
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :15
Combine all meatball ingredients in a medium bowl. Shape the mixture into 20 meatballs and place them in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cook at HIGH (100%) for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring gently 3-4 times and rearranging the meatballs as needed.
Stir the sauce ingredients in a small bowl until combined. Heat butter over HIGH (100%) for 45-1 minute or until melted. Stir in flour, dill, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Blend in milk. Cook at HIGH (100%) for 3-5 minutes, stirring after every minute until thickened and bubbly. Pour the sauce over the meatballs and sprinkle with remaining paprika. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
